HERO.TITLE: ArtistFactory
HERO.DESCRIPTION_INTRO: ArtistFactory Rehearsal Rooms and Recording Studio opened its doors in 2007! Want to practice in cozy, stylish, and clean rehearsal rooms right in the city center?
HERO.DESCRIPTION_DETAILS: We welcome everyone with regularly maintained top-tier DW, Natal, Gretsch, Yamaha drum kits and Zildjian, Istanbul, Meinl, Paiste cymbals. We replace drumheads frequently, so you don’t have to spend an hour setting up your kit.

FEATURES.TITLE: What we offer
FEATURES.ROOMS_SPACIOUS_DESC: 5 rooms between 20–40 m² — plenty of space to play.
FEATURES.PREMIUM_EQUIPMENT_DESC: High-end instruments and amps (Orange, ENGL, Fender, Warwick, Ashdown, Line6, Yamaha) plus microphones (Shure Beta 57, Audio Technica) at no extra cost.
FEATURES.AIR_CONDITIONED_DESC: Stay cool with fully air-conditioned rooms.

ROOMS.TITLE: Our Rehearsal Rooms
ROOMS.DESCRIPTION: In our rehearsal space, musicians can enjoy 6 soundproof, modern rehearsal rooms ranging from 22 m² to 40 m². Each room is well-equipped with excellent acoustics, an air exchange system, and air conditioning in the two largest rooms to ensure maximum comfort.
ROOMS.LAST_MINUTE_DESC: Flexible with your schedule? Book a rehearsal room up to 3 hours in advance and enjoy a discounted hourly rate! Fill the gaps in our calendar and save on your practice time!
ROOMS.INDIVIDUAL_DESC: Practicing solo? Rent a rehearsal room at a discounted rate and enjoy a distraction-free environment to perfect your skills!
ROOMS.MORE_INFO_PROMPT: For more details, visit the rooms page!

PRICES.TITLE: Our Prices
PRICES.CTA_DESC: Book your slot now and start playing!

CONTACT.TITLE: Visit Our Rehearsal Space
CONTACT.DESC: Our entrance is through the gate next to Pepco on Nagymező Street. Press the button labeled 'PróbaPont' to ring the bell.
CONTACT.PUBLIC_TRANSPORT: You can easily reach us by public transport: trams 2 and 2A, trolleybuses 70 and 78, buses 15 and 115, and the M3 metro are all just 5 minutes away from our rehearsal space.

ACCESS.TITLE: Getting Here
ACCESS.TRAM: By tram: Take tram 4/6 or tram 2 to Jászai Mari tér (Margit Bridge, Pest side), then walk along Pozsonyi Street (the “McDonald’s street”) — you’ll reach us in about 2 minutes.
ACCESS.TROLLEY: By trolleybus: If you come on the 76 from Keleti, get off at Radnóti Miklós utca (the second-to-last stop) — it’s just a short walk from there.
ACCESS.CAR: By car you’ll usually find street parking around the block. If you have a lot of gear, you can pull into the courtyard parking at our entrance for loading.
ACCESS.ENTRANCE: Our entrance is from the courtyard/parking area behind the block. The block is walk-through, so you can approach from any direction.

BOOKING.TITLE: Booking
BOOKING.SUCCESS_CONTENT: We look forward to seeing you
BOOKING.ORDER_DISCLAIM: You can cancel your reservation any time up to 72 hours before the booked slot. Within 72 hours the full rental fee must be paid!

ALERT.FAIL: Booking failed :( Please try again later

CONFIRM_MODAL.TITLE: Confirm Booking
CONFIRM_MODAL.CONTENT: Are you sure you want to finalize your booking? Once confirmed, you can only cancel up to 72 hours before the reserved slot.
